name: Iso11783IL_TIMSetClientStatus
title: Iso11783IL_TIMSetClientStatus
syntax: long Iso11783IL_TIMSetClientStatus(dbNode server, dword cycleTime); // form 1
long Iso11783IL_TIMSetClientStatus(dbNode server, dword cycleTime, pg TIM12 pgWithNewContent); // form 2
long Iso11783IL_TIMSetClientStatus(dbNode client, dbNode server, dword cycleTime); // form 3
long Iso11783IL_TIMSetClientStatus(dbNode client, dbNode server, dword cycleTime, pg TIM12 pgWithNewContent); // form 4
description: Forms (1,3): This function changes the cycle time of the TIM_ClientStatus_Msg message. The content of TIM_ClientStatus_Msg message stays unchanged.
Forms (2,4): This function changes the content and cycle time of the TIM_ClientStatus_Msg message.

parameters.name: cycleTime
parameters.description: Cycle time of the TIM_ClientStatus_Msg message [ms] (default: 100).

parameters.name: pgWithNewContent
parameters.description: Content of this message is used by the following TIM_ClientStatus_Msg messages sent by the TIM client.

parameters.name: server
parameters.description: The TIM client status message to this server is changed.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
